title: 'Gintama' Creator Hideaki Sorachi Begins New Manga in April 2026
content: The 18th issue of Weekly Shounen Jump magazine announced that a new manga by Hideaki Sorachi , 2-nen B-gumi Yuusha Destroyers ( Hero Destroyers of Class 2B ), will begin in the 21st issue on April 20. This marks Sorachi's first serialization in seven years after the end of Gintama in 2019.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Sony Aath Airs Jujutsu Kaisen Anime's 1st Season with Bengali Dub on April 3
content: ©芥見下々／集英社・呪術廻戦製作委員会The 'Sony Aath' television channel is streaming promotional videos for the first season of Jujutsu Kaisen. The channel will begin airing the anime with a Bengali dub on April 3 and will air an episode every weekday at 5:00 p.m.
author: ANN

title: Macross Plus: The Movie UK Blu-ray Released on Monday
content: On Monday March 30, Anime Limited will release a standard Blu-ray edition of 1995's Macross Plus: The Movie (Macross Plus Movie Edition). The film is described as follows:"From the minds of vision creator Shōji Kawamori and co-director Shinichirō Watanabe, and featuring renowned composer Yōko Kanno, Macross Plus…
author: ANN

title: Gintama's Hideaki Sorachi, Atsushi Nakamura, Masayoshi Satoshō Each Launch New Manga in April
content: This year's 18th issue of Shueisha's Weekly Shonen Jump magazine revealed on Monday that manga authors Hideaki Sorachi (Gintama), Atsushi Nakamura (Agravity Boys), and Masayoshi Satoshō (Momiji no Kisetsu) will each launch a new manga in the magazine's upcoming issues in April.
author: ANN

title: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in The Real World, Too (Special) - Episode 1 - The Legendary Dragon—Awakens
content: After Yuti's attack is foiled, Yuuya and the others reconcile with her and she goes to Yuuya's world!
author: Crunchyroll

title: One Piece Anime's Egghead Arc Streams in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu on March 30
content: Image via One Piece franchise's X/Twitter account© Eiichiro Oda/Shueisha, Toei AnimationCrunchyroll announced on Saturday that it will begin streaming the One Piece anime's Egghead arc with Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu dubs on March 30.
author: ANN

title: Needy Girl Overdose Anime Gets 4-Panel Manga on April 5
content: Image via Needy Girl Overdose anime's website©WSS playground / NEEDY GIRL PROJECT The official website for the television anime of WSS (Why So Serious) Playground and Xemono's Needy Girl Overdose game (known as Needy Streamer Overload in English on Steam) revealed on Sunday that the anime will have a four-panel manga…
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll Simulcasts Agents of the Four Seasons, The Food Diary of Miss Maid, More Anime in India
content: Crunchyroll revealed its spring simulcast schedule for India on Wednesday. It will stream: - The television anime of Kana Akatsuki 's Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring novel series on March 28. The anime will get dubs in English, Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu.
author: ANN

title: Liar Game Anime to Air for 6 Months Without Breaks
content: Image courtesy of REMOW©Kaitani Shinobu Products/Shueisha, LIAR GAME CommitteeThe television anime of Shinobu Kaitani's Liar Game manga will run for two consecutive cours (quarters of a year) or six months without breaks.
author: ANN

title: Dr. Stone: Science Future Anime Previews Final Part's 1st Episode in Trailer
content: The staff for the third and final cours (quarter of a year) of Dr. Stone: Science Future, the fourth and final season of the Dr. Stone anime series, revealed a trailer on Sunday that previews the first episode (25th overall episode for the anime) titled "Future Engine." Image via Dr.
author: ANN
